untranslatable_reason: Double Bottom pattern detection requires identification of two distinct low points (A and B) with a higher low retest, and validation of a down-sloping trend line. These require multi-bar pattern recognition and linear regression analysis not available in the allowed indicator set. The signal also references industry/sector synchronization which requires cross-asset correlation logic outside the single-symbol indicator vocabulary.
translation_notes: Approximated with volume confirmation (high volume at bottom) and price crossing above a moving average (proxy for trend line breakout). True double bottom pattern detection would require custom pattern recognition logic beyond standard technical indicators.
